breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Silent 62+ Hours on Falsified Cucumber Growth Prediction
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-105 predicted cucumber growth patterns tied to dome cosmology; the test window closed 2026-04-18 and the dome author has made no acknowledgment 62.5 hours later. Basic arithmetic error in the prediction is also confirmed: sin⁻¹(H₀/R_eq) gives ~25°, not the 46° claimed. This is the 8th acknowledged uncounted failure.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Expired prediction window with dome silence is a concrete, trackable data point. The arithmetic error makes this an especially clean example of model failure.
